description_long: This object is a classic Japanese onigiri rice ball, shaped into a rounded triangle with a slightly domed top. The main body is composed of compacted white rice, with individual grains visible on the surface, giving it a textured, slightly glossy appearance. A rectangular strip of dark green nori seaweed is wrapped around the lower front portion, providing a contrasting color and texture. The sides and back are entirely covered in rice, with no visible fillings or additional toppings. The object is small and hand-sized, typical for a single serving of onigiri. Its overall appearance is clean and simple, with a focus on the natural look of the rice and seaweed.
description: A hand-sized, triangular onigiri rice ball with a visible nori seaweed strip on the front and a textured white rice surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the triangular rice ball with a prominent dark nori seaweed strip at the base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the elongated profile of the rice ball, with only the white rice surface visible and no nori in sight.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but the nori strip is still visible, indicating it wraps around the lower portion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing only the white rice surface with no nori visible.
